# Dr. Sean Tobin

> I'm a clinical psychologist and Catholic author. I write about healing, humanity, and the interior life: integration in a world increasingly fragmented. The Inner Exodus is the way through.

Dr. Sean Tobin, Psy.D., is a clinical psychologist, Catholic author, and worship
leader (Psychologist · Author · Worship Leader). His work — the Inner Exodus — is about healing,
formation, and staying fully human in the age of AI. He writes weekly essays,
publishes books, and speaks on psychology, spiritual warfare and deliverance,
attention, and artificial intelligence.

## Books

- [Remaining Human](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0H7SJRZM5): A plain-language companion to Pope Leo XIV's encyclical on AI
- [Big God, Little Devil](https://biggodlittledevil.com/): A radical shift in the approach to spiritual warfare and deliverance
- [Sick Seven](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0H7QSF7Y2): A children's story about anxiety and presence
- [The Heart of Exorcism](https://drseantobin.ca/books/): Faith, healing, and evangelization
- [Humanity in the Age of AI](https://drseantobin.ca/books/): Staying human when the machines arrive
- [Big God, Little Devil Companion Workbook](https://drseantobin.ca/books/): A guided workbook for the journey out of fear

## Essays

- [The Question Is the Skill](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/stop-asking-ai-like-its-google/): Why the people who thrive with AI won’t have better models. They’ll have better minds.
- [The Pope Saw It Coming](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-most-important-ai-document-of/): His first encyclical is about AI. Almost nobody will read it. That’s part of the problem.
- [Use It or Be Used](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/use-it-or-be-used/): The dividing line in the age of AI is not early or late. It is whether you use your time, or let it be used.
- [Machines Will Learn to Take Offense](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-machines-will-learn-to-take-offense/): A country just gave AI corporations legal personhood. The metaphysics won't decide this. The moral pressure will.
- [What Is College For When the Machine Can Do It?](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/what-is-college-for-when-the-machine/): The real crisis AI brings to the university isn’t academic dishonesty. It’s purpose.
- [Can an App Actually Help You Be More Human?](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/i-built-an-ai-to-give-your-attention/): A private AI examination of conscience in an age designed to capture your attention.
- [The Religion of the Upgrade](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/youre-too-late/): The oldest promise in history has returned wearing new technology.
- [If We Reach the Stars](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/we-were-always-going-to-leave/): The Forgotten Question at the Heart of Humanity’s Greatest Adventure
- [The Automation Boundary](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-automation-boundary/): Here is a question worth sitting with longer than a scroll usually allows
- [Is AI Conscious? Wrong Question.](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/is-ai-conscious-wrong-question/): A Nobel laureate says yes. A Pope says something a machine can never become. The answer depends entirely on what you think a person is.
- [The Exorcist and the UFO Files](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-exorcist-and-the-ufo-files/): The Strange Agreement Between UFO Believers and Demon Hunters
- [The Upgrade](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-upgrade/): Transhumanism, the Church, and the question of what we are
- [Inside the Vatican’s Exorcism Course](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/inside-romes-exorcism-course/): A psychologist’s perspective on deliverance, healing, and the human person
- [The God You’re Praying To When You Open ChatGPT](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-god-youre-praying-to-when-you/): On idolatry, loneliness, and what AI can’t give you — no matter how warmly it responds
- [The Grief Nobody Is Naming](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-grief-nobody-is-naming/): Why your confusion about AI isn’t a problem to solve — it’s a passage to move through
- [AI’s Most Powerful Builders Are Turning to Rome](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-builders-came-to-rome/): Why the creators of the machine are asking ancient spiritual authority to guide what comes next.
- [The Vatican Understands the Real AI Crisis](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-vatican-understands-the-real/): What Magnifica Humanitas gets right — and what it still hasn’t reckoned with
- [When the Lights Come On](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-the-lights-come-on/): What life looks like when AI becomes electricity
- [You Can Access Brilliance. You Cannot Download Wisdom.](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-thing-ai-cannot-give-you/): On the kind of knowing that cannot be democratized
- [You Can Be Perfectly Understood and Still Be Lonely](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/you-can-be-perfectly-understood-and/): On being modeled versus being known — and why the difference is everything
- [The Church Was Never Meant to Be Comfortable](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-church-was-never-meant-to-be/): Ekklesia, Incarnation, and the war we were called to wage
- [AI Is a Left Brain Tool](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-left-brain-event/): What AI can optimize and what it cannot touch
- [Before You Can Hear Him](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/before-you-can-hear-him/): Why discernment requires purification, not just prayer
- [Buy Back Your Time](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/buy-back-your-time/): On chronos, kairos, and what no productivity system can restore
- [The One Skill That Changes Everything Else](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-one-skill-that-changes-everything/): Why the ability to watch your own mind may be the most human capacity left
- [The Devil Traffics in Reaction](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-devil-traffics-in-reaction/): Spirit-led versus algorithmic living — and why the difference is everything
- [Why Your Brain Dreams](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/why-your-brain-dreams/): And What God Is Doing While It Does
- [The Wound That Became the Ministry](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-wound-that-became-the-ministry/): On the strange mercy of being formed by the thing that most hurt you
- [NAVIGATE: An Inner Map for the Age of AI](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/navigate-an-inner-map-for-the-age/): Eight pressures shaping who you become—and how to respond.
- [You’re Not Busy, You’re Afraid to Stop](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/you-dont-have-to-earn-the-rest/): How anxiety disguises itself as productivity—and keeps you from rest
- [When You’re Not Sure God Will Provide Enough](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-youre-not-sure-god-will-provide/): On hunger, the comparison to easier seasons, and the economy of the wilderness
- [You Rejected a God Who Doesn't Exist](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-god-you-rejected-was-never-really/): The Psychology of Unbelief and the Father Behind It
- [Outlasting the Digital Empire](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-desert-fathers-are-the-most-relevant/): Why the desert fathers are the most practical thinkers of our moment
- [The Best and Worst Thing That Has Ever Happened to Us](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-best-and-worst-thing-that-has/): Where do you actually stand on AI?
- [What the Shepherds Aren’t Saying](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/what-the-shepherds-arent-saying/): The Church, superintelligence, and the prophetic silence that cannot continue
- [The Mark of the Beast Isn’t Coming. It’s Already Here.](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-mark-of-the-beast-isnt-coming/): What Revelation is actually diagnosing — and why the real danger has nothing to do with microchips
- [We Are Already at AGI](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/we-are-already-at-agi/): What Comes Next Should Terrify and Awaken You
- [Forty Days Without a Phone](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/forty-days-without-a-phone/): What silence revealed about attention, anxiety, and the illusion of connection in the age of algorithms
- [Lent in an Age of Acceleration](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/lent-in-an-age-of-acceleration/): Practicing the Sacred Pause While the World Speeds Up
- [Led Out, Not Upgraded](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-wilderness-of-enough/): Exodus, Artificial Intelligence, and the Refining of Our Desires
- [I Wrote This With AI](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/i-used-ai-to-write-this/): On Genius, Cheapened Signals, and the Ceiling That Machines Cannot Reach
- [Pronouns, Gender, and the War on the Body](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-it-becomes-he/): AI, Pronouns, and Why the Body is Losing the Argument
- [Beyond Lust: What AI Is Really Doing to Human Desire](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-pornography-goes-virtual/): Pornography, digital intimacy, and why someone always pays the cost
- [AI, Personhood, and the End of the Binary](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/ai-personhood-and-the-end-of-the/): What Experts Get Right—and What Christianity Has Always Known
- [Cultivating Community in a Kingdom That Expands](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/cultivating-community-in-a-kingdom/): From the helplessness of isolation to the authority of encounterable love
- [WALL-E Spirituality](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/wall-e-spirituality/): Comfort as a Substitute for Communion
- [Abundance Without Meaning](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/abundance-without-meaning/): AI, Robots, and the Crisis of the Human Person
- [The Children’s Bread](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-childrens-bread/): Deliverance, Faith, and the Power of Beholding Jesus
- [When Obedience Disappoints](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-love-disappoints/): Why Jesus Refused to Become Who People Needed Him to Be
- [The Anointing That Reaches the Fringe](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-power-that-flows-to-the-fringe/): From the Tassel of Jesus to the Integrated Body of the Church
- [Stop Chasing the Snake](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/stop-chasing-the-snake/): On Healing, Justice, and the Wounds Only God Can Restore
- [Knowing About God… or Actually Knowing Him?](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/knowing-about-god-or-actually-knowing/): Intellectual and Sapiential Ways of Approaching the Living Truth
- [Deliverance Without Fear | Restore the Glory Podcast](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/deliverance-without-fear-restore/): Why healing begins when the heart returns to Christ
- [The Comfort of Gathering, the Cost of Mission](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-comfort-of-gathering-the-cost/): SEEK and the Difference Between Consolation and Conversion
- [Turning Forty in the Wilderness](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/turning-forty-in-the-wilderness/): New Year's Day, an Inner Exodus, and AI Angels
- [Still Here, Still Becoming](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-middle-is-not-failure/): Why the in-between is not a mistake
- [The Eve Effect (Reframed)](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-eve-effect/): Why Men and Women Will Use Chatbots Differently—Without One Being “More Deceived”
- [A Very Patient Devil](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-the-century-ran-out-a-screwtape/): A Screwtape Reflection on Technology, Time, and the Formation of the Modern Soul
- [The Lie Beneath Enhancement: What Halo, AI, and Christmas Are Really Telling Us](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-master-chief-problem-why-christmas/): Why becoming “more than human” may actually cost us our humanity
- [Hearts That Burn in the Age of Machines](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/becoming-people-of-the-heart/): Why Information Will Never Replace Presence
- [The Serpent Didn’t Shout](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/why-super-intelligence-whispers-before/): Why the future of AI will shape authority through conversation, not power
- [The Armor of God vs. the Armor of AGI](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-armor-of-god-vs-the-armor-of/): Why Perfect Self-Protection Will Become Our Spiritual Coffin
- [What AI Can Never Heal](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/what-ai-can-never-heal/): And Why You Can’t Therapy Your Way Out of Sin
- [The Coming Great Shift: How AGI Will Change Everything—And Why the Church Must Wake Up](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/becoming-a-mystical-human-in-the/): A hopeful guide for ordinary Catholics entering an extraordinary future.
- [The God-Man and the Machine](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/superintelligence-already-walked/): Why No AI—No Matter How Powerful—Can Imitate the Wisdom of Jesus
- [🎧 Listen Free: The Opening Chapters of “Big GOD, Little Devil”](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/free-audiobook-preview-hear-the-heart/): Step into a new way of seeing spiritual warfare — rooted not in fear, but in the victory you already stand in.
- [When God Speaks in the Night](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-god-speaks-in-the-night/): On the Theology, Psychology, and Discernment of Dreams
- [The Sacred Return to Now](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/thanksgiving-the-doorway-back-into/): How Praise, Presence, and Humility Break the Grip of Anxiety
- [First Fruits: The Path From Repentance to Thanksgiving](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/repentance-reordering-thanksgiving/): Cain and Abel, self-reliance, and the quiet return to God that changes how we see everything we already have.
- [When Our Tools Stop Working: The Holy Invitation Beyond Technique](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-our-tools-stop-working-the-holy/): Reflections from my conversation with Matt Lozano on the Open Doors Podcast
- [The Real Issue Isn’t AI. It’s Our Fear of New Instruments.](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/ai-anointing-and-the-fear-of-new/): Rethinking anointing, creativity, and worship in a changing world.
- [When Your Inner Life Feels Like a Borderland, Not a Home](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-your-inner-life-feels-like-a/): Why God often works most in the places that feel least “spiritual.”
- [The Little Finger That Teaches Me About God](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-finger-of-god-and-the-little/): What my daughter’s smallest requests reveal about the Holy Spirit’s gentle way of moving the human heart.
- [When Miracles Look Like AI](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-miracles-look-like-ai/): Holding on to wonder when every sign can be faked.
- [When Truth Comes from the “Wrong” Mouth](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-truth-comes-from-the-wrong-mouth/): How cognitive biases blind us to grace—and how the saints teach us to see again
- [The Resurrection Was a Roast](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-god-who-mocks-death/): How God Turned Death Into the Ultimate Punchline
- [🎃 RECLAIM THE NIGHT: Sanctifying Halloween](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-devil-doesnt-own-halloween/): Prophetic souling and the authority we forgot
- [Gallows Humor and the God Who Laughs at Death](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/gallows-humor-and-the-god-who-laughs/): Why Jesus — and the Irish — teach us how to survive sorrow with joy
- [You’re Already Catholic — You Just Don’t Know It Yet](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/youre-already-catholic-you-just-dont/): Why there’s only one Body (and you’re in it)
- [When People Say the Rosary Is Sorcery](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-people-say-the-rosary-is-sorcery/): How my last post triggered a wave of comments about “Mary worship” — and why I’m actually grateful for it.
- [The Rosary: God’s Love in Beads and Breath](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-rosary-gods-love-in-beads-and/): How a simple prayer became Scripture in motion — and a maternal instrument of the Spirit
- [The Grace of Being Wrong (and the Poetry of Words) ](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-grace-of-being-wrong-and-the/): Apparently Not a Heretic—Just Bad at Hebrew
- [The Secret Hidden in Genesis 1:1](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/written-from-the-beginning/): The first word of Scripture encodes the Cross—letter by letter
- [The Enneagram from a Catholic Perspective: A Guide to Discernment](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-enneagram-from-a-catholic-perspective/): How Catholics can wisely evaluate popular personality tools in light of their faith
- [Clickbait for the Kingdom](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/clickbait-for-the-kingdom/): Fishers of men in a world of algorithms
- [What my daughter taught me about trust (and why we reach for control when we’re afraid)](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-control-masquerades-as-connection/): Safety, surrender, and what happens when we mistake control for connection.
- [The Error of Our Life](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-error-of-our-life/): Why Holiness Offends and Comfort Deceives
- [When Your Bones Dry Up: The Biblical Path Through a Crushed Spirit](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-your-bones-dry-up-the-biblical/): Why Inner Despair Weighs Heavier Than Sickness—and Where God Meets Us There
- [St. Michael and the Anchor of Identity](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/st-michael-and-the-anchor-of-identity/): Who is like God?
- [Kingdom Medicine](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/kingdom-medicine/): Where Medicine and Miracles Meet
- [Get Behind Me, Satan](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/get-behind-me-satan/): When Your Reasoning Turns Against God
- [The God We Imagine](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-god-we-imagine/): When Lies Become Bondage
- [Why I Plan on Being Unemployed When Jesus Comes Again](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/why-i-plan-on-being-unemployed-when/): When Healing Isn't a Full-Time Job
- [When Jesus Said ‘Cut It Off’—and What He Really Meant](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-jesus-said-cut-it-offand-what/): The Most Misunderstood Line Jesus Ever Spoke
- [We Chase Snakes Instead of Treating the Bite](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/we-chase-snakes-instead-of-treating/): Why We Don't Heal from the Pain of Being Wounded—and How God Offers the Anti-Venom
- [From Wizards to Prophets](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/from-wizards-to-prophets/): Why the Supernatural Story Matters
- [When Demonic Manifestations Signal a Barrier to Faith](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-demonic-manifestations-signal/): Why the early Church saw demonic manifestations as a lack of faith, not a show of power
- [When Demons Tell Our Story](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/when-demons-tell-our-story/): Why Wounds Are Their Favorite Language
- [Cleansing & Protection Prayers](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/cleansing-and-protection-prayers/): Repositioned in Christ, Not Ruled by Fear
- [Are Other People's Prayers Dangerous? ](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/are-other-peoples-prayers-dangerous/): Reframing Spiritual Boundaries Without Fear
- [Black Magic Coffee and the Conscience of the Believer ](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/black-magic-coffee-and-the-conscience/): Discernment in a World of Spiritual Mimicry
- [The War is Won: Why “Big God, Little Devil” Is Revolutionary](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-war-is-won-why-big-god-little/): The enemy is disarmed. Victory is assured. So why are so many Christians still living in fear?
- ["The Ritual" Got It Wrong—And We Still Do](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-ritual-got-it-wrongand-we-still/): How We Misuse the Rite of Exorcism
- [From Cowering to Conviction:](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/not-cowering-but-conviction/): Rethinking the Fear of the Lord
- [Renunciation in Deliverance Ministry:](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/renunciation-in-deliverance-ministry/): Finding the Heart of Freedom
- [Impartation of Spiritual Gifts:](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/impartation/): Recovering a Charismatic Grace in Catholic Tradition
- [The Irony in Fr. Ripperger's View on Emotions and Demons:](https://drseantobin.ca/writing/the-irony-in-fr-rippergers-view-on/): A Cycle of Emotional Reasoning and Superstition
